text: There's a quote that I love from Dr.
Cash. I'll probably butcher it, but
experts
have more ways to win
than beginners do.
And so, if an expert goes into any
setting that they're expert in, they
have so many faster feedback loops that

ultimate outcome. So, if you're a master

You have a positive feedback loop. And
so, I think when you're on the start
path, you can't look at the outcome as

make it. And so, the positive frame that
I've always used is sure, you can have
the external ones of like I like
thinking about my first videos had like
13 views and I'm like, well, if I had a

was helpful.
But the the most helpful frame was
thinking about who I was becoming as the

time, whenever I finished a long day's
work, I was becoming more like the type
of person who could work for 5 years
without reward. And that would be part

some some of the biggest reinforces I've
